intro.title: Relationship Boundaries
intro.p1: Healthy relationships require clear boundaries. Boundaries define where you end and your partner begins, helping preserve your sense of self and mutual respect. 🌱
intro.p2: This activity is a space to pause and map the emotional boundaries in your life — understanding who currently holds what level of access, care, and influence.
intro.p3: There's no right or wrong here. Just a clear view of your limits. ✨
intro.italic: 🌿 Boundaries are a bridge to connection, not a wall.

circle.subtitle: Mapping your personal boundaries
circle.title: Mapping Your Boundaries 🔮
circle.desc: Think about the people in your life and the emotional boundaries you maintain with them.
circle.instruction: 👆 Tap each bubble and add someone who fits that level of emotional proximity and limit.
circle.italic: 🤍 Honest boundaries protect your emotional energy.

reflection.subtitle: Final boundaries reflection
reflection.title: What Do You Notice About Your Limits?
reflection.p_intro: Take a moment to look at your boundary map. You might notice:
list: Some relationships have comfortable, mutual boundaries
Some connections feel like they cross your personal limits
Some boundaries feel overly rigid, creating emotional distance
Gaps where you need to communicate your boundaries more clearly
reflection.italic: Clarifying your boundaries helps you connect deeply without losing yourself. 🧘
reflection.label: 💭 Where do you need to communicate or strengthen a boundary?

history.title: Boundaries Map History
history.subtitle: A record of your personal boundaries over time.
